name: TwoColumnLayout
description: A responsive two-column layout with a sidebar on the left and a main content area on the right. The sidebar supports navigation links, widgets, or auxiliary content. On smaller screens, the layout stacks vertically with the sidebar on top.

visual.description: Full-height two-column layout. Left sidebar with navigation links, logo, and optional widgets. Right main content area with header and scrollable body. Sidebar collapses on mobile.

props.name: sidebarWidth
props.description: Width of the sidebar in pixels

props.name: sidebarTitle
props.description: Title displayed at the top of the sidebar

props.name: mainTitle
props.description: Title for the main content header

props.name: collapsible
props.description: Whether the sidebar can be collapsed

examples.prompt: two column layout with sidebar and main content
A two column layout with a sidebar on the left and main content on the right
layout with left sidebar and right content area
admin panel layout with sidebar navigation
